## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss AI role-play platform strategy and content optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exec's focus is on their AI role-play training platform, targeting large companies (500+ employees) with custom scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Content strategy shift: Move from saturated "AI role-play" topics to thought leadership on conversation science and sales methodologies](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [Plan to conduct content audit, refresh existing high-performing content, and create new thought leadership pieces based on customer insights](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)

## Topics

### Exec Product Overview

  - [Two products: human-based coaching (deprioritized) and AI training platform (focus)](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [AI role-plays tool: Realistic, customized scenarios for practice with immediate feedback](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Key use cases: onboarding, new product releases, organizational transformation](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Target verticals: Sales, customer-facing teams, professional services](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Current Content Performance

  - [Ranking well for "AI role-play" related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Some content feels generic or AI-generated](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Need to optimize high-performing pages and create more unique, thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Shift focus from "how to build role-play scenarios" to thought leadership on conversation science and sales methodologies](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Integrate role-play concepts into broader sales and training topics](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Use customer insights and exec team knowledge to create unique content](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Consider refreshing and expanding existing content instead of creating new similar pieces](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Recently started tracking inbound demo requests](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
  - [Need to connect GA4 events to content performance](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [Plan to improve Looker dashboards with more customer-centric reports](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)

### Thought Leadership Process

  - [Proposal to conduct weekly calls with execs (e.g., Nick) to capture insights](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Use transcripts to generate blog posts and LinkedIn content](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [Ensure content maintains authentic voice and unique market perspective](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to conduct content audit and propose refreshes for existing content](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=2335.0)
  - [Exec to provide CMS export with published dates for content analysis](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=2327.0)
  - [Garett to add GA4 event data to Looker Studio report](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)
  - [Set up calls with Nick for thought leadership content generation](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=2364.0)
  - [GrowthX to update content workflows with insights from this meeting](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=2500.0)
  - [Explore options for sharing customer call insights without compromising privacy](https://fathom.video/share/EZsxn4mQMsEs_JKmiDV6h_GxjazKdaWr?tab=summary&timestamp=2407.0)
